revanced-frontend: Concept-first frontend rails for AI coding agents. Forces CONCEPT/BAR/SIGNATURE/SYSTEM, craft-product or award-experience ambition, owned visual system, conversion jobs in order, anti-slop defenses, and a review receipt. For landings, portfolios, marketing pages, and light redesigns.
revanced-complete: Full-output enforcement. Bans placeholder code, truncated files, and soft exits. Use whenever the agent must ship complete implementations.
revanced-redesign: Audit-first redesign for existing codebases. Scan, diagnose, prioritized fixes, silent contracts (routes/forms/nav labels). Use when improving an existing project.
revanced-strict: High-pressure rails when default output is too safe/template-like. Mandatory design_plan, layout seed, AIDA flow, 2-line hero iron rule, gapless grids, aggressive bans. Especially useful for GPT/Codex-class runs.
revanced-stitch: Writes a semantic DESIGN.md contract for handoff (Stitch or coding agents). Does not call external image/Stitch APIs.
